meanings.usage: 指新年的决心或决定，常用make a resolution
由mental加-ly构成，修饰动词或形容词
形容令人印象深刻或感到畏惧的事物
形容缺乏变化、重复的事物
指达到目标或获得成就
形容长期形成的难以改变的习惯
指未能实现目标的失望感
形容有强烈愿望和目标的
形容认真不懈地做某事
指出卖或泄露秘密，也可指暴露内心感受
指用言语嘲笑或羞辱他人
指兴趣、力量等逐渐减少
指导致失败或毁灭的事物
指控制自己行为的能力

examples.en: The same old favourites recur year in year out with monotonous regularity.
examples.zh: 同样的喜好年复一年地以单调的规律性重复出现。

examples.en: Do a thousand and one jobs about the house.
We never have time to carry them out.
examples.zh: 我们从没有时间去实现它们。

examples.en: When we slip back into our bad old ways.
examples.zh: 当我们重新回到坏习惯时。

examples.en: I applied myself assiduously to the task.
examples.zh: 我勤奋地致力于这项任务。

phrases.usage: 悄悄溜下；蹑手蹑脚地走下

examples.en: I managed to creep down into the living room.
I fended off the taunts and jibes of the family.
examples.zh: 我挡开了家人的嘲笑和讽刺。

examples.en: Little by little the eleven minutes fell to zero.
examples.zh: 渐渐地，十一分钟降到了零。

examples.en: I soon got back to my old bad habit of dozing off in front of the screen.
examples.zh: 我很快又回到了在屏幕前打瞌睡的坏习惯。

phrases.usage: 对某事保密；不告诉别人

examples.en: This year I attempted to keep my resolutions to myself.
examples.zh: 今年我试图对自己的决心保密。

grammar.title: 动词不定式作表语 (Infinitive as Predicative)
grammar.definition: 动词不定式可以在句中作表语，说明主语的内容或目标
grammar.structure: 主语 + be + to + 动词原形
grammar.usage: 用于说明计划、意图、命运等，或与resolution, aim, goal等名词搭配

examples.en: My resolution is to read more.
Our aim is to finish the project on time.
examples.zh: 我们的目标是按时完成项目。

grammar.title: 结果状语从句 (Consecutive Clause)
grammar.definition: 由so...that或such...that引导，表示某种原因导致的结果
grammar.structure: so + adj/adv + that / such + (a/an) + adj + n + that
grammar.usage: 用于描述由于前面情况而产生的自然结果

examples.en: The daily exercises lasted only eleven minutes so that I could finish them quickly.
examples.zh: 每日锻炼只持续了十一分钟，所以我能很快完成。

examples.en: It was such cold weather that nobody wanted to go out.
examples.zh: 天气太冷了，没有人想出去。

grammar.title: 定冠词the的特指用法 (Definite Article 'the' for Specific Reference)
grammar.definition: 定冠词the用于特指谈话双方都知道的特定事物
grammar.usage: 当名词被上下文限定、或者谈话双方都知道的事物时使用the

examples.en: The next morning the whole family trooped in.
examples.zh: 第二天早上，全家人鱼贯而入。

examples.en: The dog is sleeping under the table.
examples.zh: 那只狗正在桌子下面睡觉。

sentencePatterns.pattern: We resolve to + 动词原形

original.en: We resolve to get up earlier each morning.
original.zh: 我们决心每天早上早起。

imitations.en: I resolve to exercise more this year.
She resolves to learn a new language.
imitations.zh: 她决心学习一门新语言。

sentencePatterns.pattern: It is/was + this/that + that + 动词

original.en: It was this that betrayed me.

imitations.en: It was the cold weather that kept me indoors.
imitations.zh: 正是寒冷的天气让我待在室内。

imitations.en: It was her kindness that saved the day.
imitations.zh: 正是她的善良挽救了局面。

sentencePatterns.pattern: Little by little + 主语 + 动词

original.en: Little by little the eleven minutes fell to zero.
original.zh: 渐渐地，十一分钟降到了零。

imitations.en: Little by little the snow melted away.
Little by little he recovered his confidence.

sentencePatterns.pattern: Past experience has taught us that + 从句

original.en: Past experience has taught us that certain accomplishments are beyond attainment.
original.zh: 过去的经验告诉我们，某些目标是无法实现的。

imitations.en: Life has taught us that patience is a virtue.
imitations.zh: 生活教会我们耐心是一种美德。

imitations.en: Experience has taught me that honesty pays off.
imitations.zh: 经验告诉我诚实是有回报的。
